name: Deel
description: Deel is a global HR and payroll platform for hiring and paying remote workers in 150+ countries. The API provides programmatic access to contracts, people management, payments, invoices, timesheets, milestones, EOR (Employer of Record) services, and organizational data. Use it to automate the full contractor and employee lifecycle from onboarding through payroll.

capabilities.name: contracts_list
capabilities.description: List all contracts across the organization with filtering by type, status, and country.

capabilities.name: contracts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific contract with full details.

capabilities.name: contracts_update
capabilities.description: Add an external ID to a contract for integration purposes.

capabilities.name: contracts_gp_create
capabilities.description: Create a Global Payroll contract for a new employee.

capabilities.name: contracts_amend
capabilities.description: Amend an existing contract (change compensation, title, etc.).

capabilities.name: contracts_sign
capabilities.description: Sign a contract on behalf of the client.

capabilities.name: contracts_terminate
capabilities.description: Initiate contract termination with compliance handling.

capabilities.name: contracts_preview
capabilities.description: Get an HTML preview of a contract document.

capabilities.name: contracts_custom_fields_list
capabilities.description: List all custom fields defined for contracts.

capabilities.name: contracts_documents_create
capabilities.description: Attach a document to a contract.

capabilities.name: people_create
capabilities.description: Create a new worker (employee) in Deel.

capabilities.name: people_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single worker's profile and contract details.

capabilities.name: people_personal_update
capabilities.description: Update a worker's personal information.

capabilities.name: people_department_update
capabilities.description: Update a worker's department assignment.

capabilities.name: people_custom_fields_list
capabilities.description: List all custom fields for people.

capabilities.name: payments_list
capabilities.description: List all payments across contracts.

capabilities.name: payments_breakdown_get
capabilities.description: Get a detailed breakdown of a specific payment.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List paid invoices with date filtering.

capabilities.name: invoices_deel_list
capabilities.description: List Deel platform fee invoices.

capabilities.name: adjustments_create
capabilities.description: Create a payment adjustment (bonus, expense, deduction).

capabilities.name: adjustments_categories_list
capabilities.description: List all adjustment categories.

capabilities.name: adjustments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a pending adjustment.

capabilities.name: invoice_adjustments_create
capabilities.description: Create an invoice line item adjustment.

capabilities.name: timesheets_create
capabilities.description: Submit a timesheet entry for a contractor.

capabilities.name: timesheets_list
capabilities.description: List timesheets for a specific contract.

capabilities.name: timesheets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a timesheet entry.

capabilities.name: timesheets_review_batch
capabilities.description: Approve or reject multiple timesheets in batch.

capabilities.name: milestones_create
capabilities.description: Add a milestone to a contract.

capabilities.name: milestones_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a milestone.

capabilities.name: eor_create
capabilities.description: Create an Employer of Record contract quote.

capabilities.name: eor_cost_calculate
capabilities.description: Calculate estimated employment costs for a country.

capabilities.name: eor_validations_get
capabilities.description: Get country-specific hiring requirements and validations.

capabilities.name: departments_list
capabilities.description: List all departments.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: List all teams.

capabilities.name: managers_list
capabilities.description: List all managers.

capabilities.name: legal_entities_list
capabilities.description: List all legal entities in your organization.

capabilities.name: organizations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve organization details.

capabilities.name: contract_templates_list
capabilities.description: List available contract templates.

capabilities.name: lookups_countries
capabilities.description: List all supported countries for hiring.

capabilities.name: lookups_currencies
capabilities.description: List all supported currencies.

capabilities.name: lookups_job_titles
capabilities.description: List available job titles.

capabilities.name: lookups_seniorities
capabilities.description: List seniority levels.

capabilities.name: lookups_time_off_types
capabilities.description: List available time-off types.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: webhooks_events_list
capabilities.description: List all available webhook event types.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: candidates_create
capabilities.description: Add a candidate to Deel for potential hiring.

capabilities.name: candidates_update
capabilities.description: Update candidate details.

capabilities.name: workers_documents_list
capabilities.description: List all documents for a worker.
